title: paraphlomis albiflora var. biflora
intro: Paraphlomis albiflora var. biflora is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the "White Flower Paraphlomis." It is a perennial herb native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and other compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory issues. Paraphlomis albiflora var. biflora can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
